strengths: 20 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and real-time systems—demonstrates rapid mastery across domains and technical depth
Proven technical leadership as Staff Engineer with strong teaching/mentoring track record through workshops, training, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Entrepreneurial experience as GISCollective founder combined with work in early-stage companies (WatchUp, RIDE Capital) shows ability to operate in strategic, fast-moving environments
concerns: AI expertise gap—only recent work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators; no demonstrated products, platforms, or research in AI/ML despite role requiring 'recognized expertise in AI'

No evidence of director-level organizational leadership or strategic decision-making at scale—resume shows strong individual contributor roles but not P&L responsibility, team leadership, or board-level strategy experience
Missing preferred Master's or PhD in AI-related field; cloud expertise is secondary to career focus rather than a primary area of demonstrated strategic impact
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically excellent software engineer with 20 years of experience and strong craftsmanship across multiple domains. However, this role explicitly requires principal-level AI strategy expertise with demonstrated AI products—a gap this resume does not fill. While his technical foundation is solid and he has startup experience, the combination of recent-only AI work, lack of director-level strategic leadership, and absence of an AI-focused degree represents a meaningful mismatch with the role's core focus on cloud and AI platform strategy.
